description.ko: 기하학적 유리 매질을 통해 순수한 백색광이 선명한 색의 스펙트럼으로 변하는 순간을 포착한 시각적 탐구로, 명확함과 숨겨진 깊이를 상징합니다.
description.en: A visual study of light refraction, capturing the moment pure white light transforms into a vibrant color spectrum through a geometric glass medium, representing clarity and hidden depth.

prompt: High-resolution macro photography of a triangular crystal prism positioned on a dark reflective surface. A singular beam of intense white light hits the glass, refracting into a vivid, sharp-edged rainbow spectrum across the frame. Caustic light patterns, ethereal bokeh, chromatic aberration effects, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, sharp focus on the internal light paths.
